text.title: Requirements Documentation Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the requirements-documentation methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: BR-0019 (partial invoice exception) → SH-0019 for Finance Ops + Customer Support → SR-0042 (system) + NFR-0018 (perf + audit retention) with AC per record + 2 source citations → linted; baseline tagged 2026Q2.

section.title: Resulting artefact
section.code: { "req_id": "SR-0042", "type": "SR", "title": "Partial-invoice exception path", "description": "System must support partial-invoice exception path with auditor-visible justification field.", "acceptance_criteria": [ "Given an invoice with partial payment, the system records the operator's justification.", "Given missing justification, the system blocks the operation." ], "source_citations": [ "ES-0014", "ES-0017" ], "status": "approved", "owner": "Finance Ops", "parent": "BR-0019" }
